summary: V0 Identity Epoch frozen: editorial voice, hybrid static shell, and local-first UX contracts are baseline; changes require explicit unfreeze or V1 scope.
QSD is treated as deterministic signal-processing infrastructure (fetch, gate, rank, surface) with editorial curation—not a generic news portal template.
Engineering priority shifts to V1 commercial editorial infrastructure; micro-debugging of legacy visual debt is deprioritized unless it blocks trust, readability, or shipping.
Institutional memory split adopted: canonical snapshot JSON at repo root plus append-only JSONL ledger under memory/; append-only, jq-friendly, git-first.
